positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a sleepy fox curled up next to a pile of glowing mushrooms in a misty forest clearing. Soft pastel color palette, cottagecore style, gentle lighting, storybook quality, highly detailed watercolor wash.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh edges, neon, cyberpunk
